one_line_summary: Exceptionally thorough, source-grounded docs set with near-perfect consistency and strong pedagogical flow.
strengths: Near-perfect faithfulness (99.5% pass rate) with accurate signatures copied from source
Architecture doc traces full request flow with precise file references and covers security/concurrency/tradeoffs
Tutorial uses real symbols, shows expected outputs, and honestly notes StubProvider limitations
weaknesses: Index page is minimal; lacks per-section anchors or TOC within long docs
Some API entries (HealthChecker, JobQueue, UndoStack) skip method-level signatures
Tutorial relies on ad-hoc provider stubs rather than a single coherent runnable script
